name: academorix/payout
purpose: Payout ledger — Payout + PayoutItem + PayoutReconciliation aggregates covering gateway payout events, line items, and reconciliation.
capabilities: Payout aggregate (pyo_ prefix) — one row per gateway payout event
PayoutItem (pyi_ prefix) — payments, refunds, chargebacks, fees
when_to_use: A payment gateway settles funds to the tenant and the tenant needs itemised payout tracking plus reconciliation.
when_not_to_use: For platform-fee take-rate payouts to Academorix, use academorix/marketplace-fee.
